name: mushroom
desc: a single glowing magenta-pink fairy mushroom with a domed cap and white spots, soft bioluminescent glow, top-down 3/4 view

name: tree
desc: a small round dark green pine tree seen from above, lush canopy

name: rock
desc: a smooth gray mossy boulder seen from above

name: spore
desc: a tiny glowing golden spore mote with a soft halo
